base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of menu_password_entry — a ui (menu_screen) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. 'ENTER YOUR PASSWORD.' screen — castle-entrance motif background with gothic-mountain horizon + alphabet-grid below. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
